title: PRESCRIPTION ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL ROSEBURG PRESCRIPTION ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides prescription expense assistance typically limited to $25 once per year. This program is funded through donations. 630 W Stanton Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Once per year Hours: Monday/Wednesday 10am-2pm Email (541) 580-0680 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 580-0680 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Dillard, Glide, Roseburg, and Winston TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on ground floor Services: Prescription Expense Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHING CLOSET MATERIAL GOODS - PUBLIC SHOWERS, CLOTHING CLOSET, HYGIENE SUPPLIES, BEDDING UTILITIES - FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL ROSEBURG
